name: SilbercueChrome MCP
notes: LLM-driven benchmark by Claude Opus 4.6 via MCP tools. Post Story 9.9 (Pro Feature Gates). Includes tab-switching discovery overhead (page uses tabbed layout for levels).

T1.2.notes: inspect DOM, read secret, fill + verify

T1.3.notes: fill partial, discover extra fields, complete + submit

T1.4.notes: click 4/5, inspect missing, click 5th by ID

T1.5.notes: single evaluate: all nav calls + verify

T1.6.notes: single evaluate: sum rows + fill + verify

T2.1.notes: start load, wait_for async, read + verify

T2.2.notes: tab discovery overhead (display:none), scroll iterations, verify

T2.4.notes: search+click, verify check, inspect, mousedown retry, confirm

T2.5.notes: start, switch_tab open, read value, switch_tab close, fill+verify

T3.2.notes: single evaluate: nested contentDocument access + fill + verify

T3.3.notes: single evaluate: sort items by data-value, appendChild reorder

T3.4.notes: pixel scan for circle color (225,112,85 not pure red), click at centroid

T4.2.notes: single evaluate: MutationObserver + capture at value=8

T4.3.notes: single evaluate: generate 10K + querySelector[data-needle] + fill + verify

T4.4.notes: first attempt wrong input ID, inspect HTML, fix + verify

T4.5.notes: single evaluate: MutationObserver collects 3 values + fill + verify

T4.6.notes: open modal + inspect, fill form + generate + read token + verify
